summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sarver Landscape QA app expansion features: Standards Library, Repeat Offenders, Training Sessions, Public Training endpoints, Rapid Review mobile-only launch, and navigation restrictions. All 23 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for create operations - functional but non-standard HTTP status code
Returns 200 instead of 201 for create operations - functional but non-standard HTTP status code
Requires all fields in request body instead of partial update - works but requires full payload

issues: Some images show broken image icon (01_4bb548.jpg) - likely missing or corrupted image files in Supabase storage

test_credentials: Used Owner (owner@fieldquality.local / FieldQA123!) and Production Manager (production.manager@fieldquality.local / FieldQA123!) from /app/memory/test_credentials.md
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed standards during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 validated all new features: (1) Overview page has Rapid Review mobile launch card with QR code, 'Open mobile link' button, and 'Copy phone link' button at the bottom of the page, (2) No desktop/sidebar rapid-review nav item - confirmed mobile-only, (3) /rapid-review redirects to /rapid-review/mobile correctly, (4) Rapid Review mobile page has translucent directional swipe HUD cues (Fail left, Standard right, Exemplary up, Concern down), (5) Standards Library page loads with authoring UI, search/filter, division targets, training session generator, (6) Training session generator renders with crew select, division select, item count input, create button, (7) Repeat Offenders page loads with heatmap grid showing crew/issue type cells with level indicators, (8) Training Mode public page shows friendly error state for invalid codes ('Training session not found'), (9) Training Mode public page shows 'Training session already completed' for completed sessions, (10) Owner navigation shows Overview, Owner Review, Calibration, Standards Library, Repeat Offenders, Exports, Settings - correctly hides Alignment & QR and Review Queue, (11) Management navigation shows Overview, Alignment & QR, Review Queue, Standards Library, Repeat Offenders, Settings - correctly hides Owner Review, Calibration, Exports, (12) Backend APIs all return 200: /api/standards, /api/repeat-offenders, /api/training-sessions, /api/public/training/{code}, /api/public/training/{code}/submit
